title: similarity ...
content:
bq.. And while he (Bush -  __ed.__ ) said he would like to work through the United Nations,  "when it comes to our security, we really don't need anybody's permission."

p.

now that quote sounds very familiar. if i don't know better, i'd say that one of the two you-know-who copy from each other!

 %(me)i know .. this is getting very much boring already.%
